sentence the network consists of 10 servers each with a reliability R_i where mu_i = 0.98 and sigma_i = 0.02 calculate the probability that at least 9 out of the 10 servers will have a reliability of at least 0.95 at any given time

highlighted section  
the probability that at least 9 out of the 10 servers will have a reliability of at least 0.95 at any given time is calculated using the binomial distribution with parameters n = 10 and p = probability that a single server has reliability at least 0.95

sentence the cybersecurity team detects an average of 3 attacks per hour determine the probability that exactly 5 attacks will be detected during a 2-hour monitoring period

highlighted section  
the probability that exactly 5 attacks will be detected during a 2-hour monitoring period is calculated using the Poisson distribution with lambda = 3 and k = 5
